title: Savory Fluffy Monsoon Whole Wheat Stir-fry
description: A savory and fluffy monsoon-inspired dish featuring whole wheat that is both caramelize-rich and whole30-friendly.

ingredients.name: 1/4 cup fresh parsley, chopped
ingredients.notes: dried can be used as a substitute if unavailable

instructions: Boil the whole wheat pasta in a large pot of salted water until al dente, about 8-10 minutes or as per package instructions.
Meanwhile, in a pan, heat olive oil over medium heat. Add cumin seeds and sauté for 30 seconds to release their aroma.
Add finely chopped garlic and onion to the pan; cook for another minute until fragrant.
Toss in the sliced bell pepper and let it cook for about 2-3 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Drain the pasta and add it to the pan with vegetables. Stir in fresh parsley (or dried if used), salt, and pepper to taste.
Cook everything together until all ingredients are well combined and heated through.
Serve hot as a side dish or main course.
